      hollygood121
      Ca'n Picafort, Spain
      2

      Amazing!!

      Review of BT-BookTaxi Israel
      Reviewed September 7, 2023

      From start to finish very professional I booked via the website and they contacted me via what’s app the driver Daniel was very kind and professional and very knowledgeable on the Dead Sea I am very happy with the services and will be using again also forget to mention the taxi was super clean and fresh smelling A++++++

      Date of experience: September 2023
      Thank hollygood121

      Thank you:)

      23 - 28 of 100 reviews
      Armaan G
      2
      Reviewed September 6, 2023
      Easy, affordable and reliable

      This was my first time in Israel and I was arriving at 8pm. I was totally unfamiliar with Tel-Aviv and how to get around but BT Taxi made the entire thing stress free and very easy. They had someone who was very responsive on whatsapp, as soon as I landed I was able to connect to airport wifi and begin talking with the taxi service who basically guided me through the airport and to the pickup location. The car was also very clean and the driver very nice. Highly recommend if you need a taxi.

      Date of experience: September 2023
      Thank Armaan G
      This review is the subjective opinion of a Tripadvisor member and not of Tripadvisor LLC. Tripadvisor performs checks on reviews as part of our industry-leading trust & safety standards. Read our transparency report to learn more.

      Reviewed August 15, 2023 via mobile
      Excellent Service

      We used the service for a bachelorette party. The company stayed in touch via what’s app. All questions were answered within minutes. The bus was clean and the driver very helpful. Wonderful company!

      Cindy C
      2
      Reviewed August 11, 2023 via mobile
      Easy and fairly priced car transport

      We used this service to travel from our cruise in Haifa port to Jerusalem. This taxi service was easy to book and way more affordable than booking a private transport car (while practically speaking our ride was so nice that it didn’t feel like a taxi but a private transport car!) I definitely will be using this service again to go to the airport.

      Date of experience: August 2023
      Thank Cindy C

      Zenon B
      2
      Reviewed August 10, 2023 via mobile
      If you need a taxi book with BT-BookTaxi Israel.

      We booked the taxi online. It was very easy and the car met exactly our requirements to take three of us with bags to the airport. Car driver was very professional and communicated with us prior to arrival and took us safely and on time to the airport. Highly recommend it.

      Date of experience: August 2023
      Thank Zenon B
